  1. Home

  3. 1979 Ford Pickup

1979 Ford Pickup

Overview

Exterior-focused CAD reconstruction of a classic 1979 Ford Pickup based on reference images, developed for client-specific 3D printing requirements.

Specifications

  • Model Type: Exterior surface model
  • Source: Image-based reference reconstruction
  • Geometry: Optimized for 3D printing
  • Model Type: Static (non-parametric)

Design Constraints

  • Reconstruct accurate vehicle proportions from limited image references
  • Ensure geometry is fully printable without surface defects
  • Maintain structural integrity for small-scale 3D printing
  • Optimize model for clean slicing and minimal print failure

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

J.T. Harrington

Client

Design Approach

The model was reconstructed using image-based references, focusing on capturing key exterior proportions and recognizable design features of the vehicle.

Geometry was simplified and refined to ensure watertight surfaces and compatibility with FDM 3D printing processes.

Key Features

  • Accurate exterior reconstruction from reference images
  • Watertight geometry optimized for 3D printing
  • Clean surface transitions for improved print quality
  • Print-ready model validated through physical output

Validation

  • Model successfully 3D printed by client
  • No major geometry or slicing issues reported
  • Final output confirmed structural and visual accuracy

Outcome

Delivered a print-ready CAD model of a classic pickup truck, successfully validated through real-world 3D printing and client feedback.

Project information

  • Category Client Project
  • Client J.T. Harrington
  • Project date January, 2026
  • View Project on Upwork
